---
name: Skill / Sub-Agent Request
about: Propose a new skill or sub-agent for Cariak
title: "[Skill]: "
labels: ["skill", "enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Skill name

Proposed name for the new skill or sub-agent.

## What problem does it solve?

Describe the problem this skill addresses. Why can't existing skills handle it?

## What phase in the pipeline does it belong?

- [ ] Plan (discovery, PRD, architecture, spec analysis)
- [ ] Build (implementation, testing, review)
- [ ] Review (security, performance, code quality)
- [ ] Ship (docs, release, changelog)
- [ ] Specialist (standalone utility)
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI/CD, tooling)

## What tools / MCPs would it need?

List the tool permissions and MCP servers this skill requires (e.g. write, bash, playwright, supabase, etc.).

## Example use case

Describe a concrete scenario where this skill would be used. Include sample input and expected output if possible.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or prior art.
